title: Kehlani Announces New Self-Titled Album Out Next Month
author: Margaret Farrell
summary:
Last November, Kehlani locked in her first Top 10 hit with the single "Folded." Last month, the song won her two Grammys, one for Best R&B Song and one for Best R&B Performance. She's not letting that momentum fade into the ether: Today she announced her new self-titled album is out next month via Atlantic Records.

The post Kehlani Announces New Self-Titled Album Out Next Month appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Last November, Kehlani locked in her first Top 10 hit with the single "Folded." Last month, the song won her two Grammys, one for Best R&B Song and one for Best R&B Performance. She's not letting that momentum fade into the ether: Today she announced her new self-titled album is out next month via Atlantic Records.

Aside from the release date and the album cover, there's not much else we know about Kehlani. The singer did post a side-by-side comparison of the new album cover and 2017's SweetSexySavage on her social, highlighting that both images showcase her in a very flattering boycut. I have no idea what this means for the sound of the new album, but that 2017 release was killer. I'm expecting big things! Check it out below.

Kehlani is out 4/24 via Atlantic. Pre-order here.
